command_log.command: echo '## Existing Backlog Issues' && ls .kiln/issues/*.md 2>/dev/null || echo '(none)' && echo '---' && echo '## Completed Issues' && ls .kiln/issues/completed/*.md 2>/dev/null || echo '(none)'

echo "Workflow started. Hooks are now active."
echo "Run /wheel:wheel-status to check progress, /wheel:wheel-stop to deactivate."

ls .wheel/outputs/ 2>/dev/null
echo "---"
echo "Existing issue check (grep for 'git'):"
grep -li "git" .kiln/issues/*.md 2>/dev/null | head -10

cat .wheel/outputs/check-existing-issues.txt 2>/dev/null | head -30
echo "---"
echo "More targeted git-behavior search:"
grep -liE "(git behavior|git workflow|git practices|standardize git)" .kiln/issues/*.md 2>/dev/null

echo "WHEEL_PLUGIN_shelf env var: '${WHEEL_PLUGIN_shelf:-UNSET}'"
echo "WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_DIR env var: '${WORKFLOW_PLUGIN_DIR:-UNSET}'"
echo "---"
echo "Try the literal command from the prompt:"
bash "${WHEEL_PLUGIN_shelf}/scripts/shelf-counter.sh" read 2>&1 | head -5
echo "exit: $?"
echo "---"
echo "Read result file:"
jq -r '.issue_file, .obsidian_path' .wheel/outputs/shelf-write-issue-note-result.json 2>/dev/null

SHELF_DIR="/Users/ryansuematsu/.claude/plugins/cache/yoshisada-speckit/shelf/000.001.009.247"
echo "=== shelf-counter.sh read (with manually-resolved path) ==="
bash "$SHELF_DIR/scripts/shelf-counter.sh" read
